description: Flashcards 列表与学习流程 FSRS 全链路改造 - 重构卡片集列表页面并统一到 FSRS 主口径

userStories.title: Add FSRS fields to echoe_cards table
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to add stability, difficulty, and last_review fields to the database so FSRS state can persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Add stability (DOUBLE) column to echoe_cards table
Add difficulty (DOUBLE) column to echoe_cards table
Add last_review (BIGINT) column to echoe_cards table
Add composite index on (did, queue, due)
Add index on (did, last_review)
Add index on (did, stability)
Generate and run migration successfully
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix elapsed_days calculation in FSRS scheduling
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to fix the elapsed_days calculation in echoe-study.service.ts to use (now - last_review) instead of ivl.
acceptanceCriteria: In echoe-study.service.ts, change elapsed_days from card.ivl to (now - last_review) / dayMs
Handle case when last_review is null (treat as new card)
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Persist FSRS state (stability/difficulty/last_review) on review
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to ensure stability, difficulty, and last_review are properly stored when a card is reviewed.
acceptanceCriteria: Store stability from FSRS output to card.stability field
Store difficulty from FSRS output to card.difficulty field
Store last_review as current timestamp when review submitted
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add rating preview API endpoint
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see the estimated interval before answering so I know when the card will reappear.
acceptanceCriteria: Create GET /api/v1/study/options?cardId=... endpoint
Return four options: Again/Hard/Good/Easy with next interval and due time
Use FSRS getSchedulingOptions to compute real values
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Update EchoeDeckWithCountsDto with FSRS metrics
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to add FSRS metrics to the deck list DTO so the frontend can display maturity and difficulty counts.
acceptanceCriteria: Add totalCount field to EchoeDeckWithCountsDto
Add matureCount (stability >= 21) field
Add difficultCount (retrievability < 0.9) field
Add averageRetrievability field
Add lastStudiedAt field
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Implement deck recursive aggregation for stats
userStories.description: As a user, I want parent decks to show aggregated stats from all child decks.
acceptanceCriteria: Deck stats query supports recursive aggregation of child decks
Parent deck matureCount = sum of all child deck matureCounts
Parent deck difficultCount = sum of all child deck difficultCounts
Parent deck averageRetrievability = weighted mean of children
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Fix Undo to restore complete card state
userStories.description: As a user, I want Undo to restore the exact state before review, including all FSRS fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Undo restores: due, ivl, factor, reps, lapses, left, type, queue, stability, difficulty, last_review
Store pre-review snapshot in revlog extension column or separate table
Remove logic that tries to infer due from lastIvl
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add APKG import page and fix import entry point
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dedicated APKG import page and the import button should go to the correct page.
acceptanceCriteria: Create APKG import page at /import/apkg
Fix Import .apkg button to navigate to /import/apkg (not CSV import)
Separate CSV import and APKG import into different entry points
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Implementation complete - APKG import page created, button navigation fixed

userStories.title: Redesign Flashcards list page with grid layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see flashcards in a responsive grid layout with learning metrics.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement grid layout: 1 column mobile, 2 columns tablet, 4 columns desktop
Show deck name, total cards, mastery progress bar
Show new/learn/review badges (color-coded)
Show last studied time
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Grid layout implemented with responsive columns, mastery progress bar, color-coded badges, and last studied time

userStories.title: Add search, sort, and collapsible hierarchy to deck list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search decks, sort by different criteria, and collapse/expand child decks.
acceptanceCriteria: Add search input that filters deck names in real-time
Add sort dropdown: by due count, by name A-Z, by last studied
Show collapse/expand arrows for parent decks with children
Indent child decks with visual hierarchy (left border)
Persist collapse state in localStorage or backend
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Search, sort, and collapse/expand implemented. Child decks use left border for visual hierarchy.

userStories.title: Update frontend study page to use server rating preview
userStories.description: As a user, I want the estimated intervals shown below rating buttons to come from the server (FSRS), not local calculation.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch rating preview from GET /api/v1/study/options when loading study card
Display server-calculated intervals under each rating button
Remove local heuristic interval calculation
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
userStories.notes: Rating preview API integrated. Server-calculated intervals displayed under rating buttons. Falls back to local heuristics if API unavailable.

userStories.title: Implement Standard Anki APKG import
userStories.description: As an Anki user, I want to import official Anki APKG packages with full compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Auto-detect package type (Standard Anki vs Echoe Legacy)
Read col.json for models/decks/dconf (not custom tables)
Parse media manifest and map数字文件名 to real names
Import cards with proper FSRS field backfill
Show detailed import result report with errors
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Standard Anki APKG import implemented with auto-detection, col.json parsing, media manifest mapping, and FSRS field backfill

userStories.title: Implement Standard Anki APKG export
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export packages that can be opened in Anki Desktop.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate Standard Anki package structure with col.json
Include media manifest mapping
Support includeScheduling=false (export as new cards)
Support includeScheduling=true (export with scheduling and revlog)
Default to format=anki (not legacy)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Standard Anki APKG export implemented with col.json generation, media manifest mapping, format parameter support, and backward compatibility with legacy format

userStories.title: Refactor stats service to use FSRS stability
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to refactor the stats service to use stability instead of ivl for maturity calculations.
acceptanceCriteria: Update getMaturity to use stability >= 21 for mature classification
Update getMaturityBatch for batch operations
Add retrievability calculation: R(t,S) = (1 + t/(9S))^(-1)
Ensure stats, deck list, study queue use consistent due time semantics (ms timestamp)
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Updated getMaturity and getMaturityBatch to use stability instead of ivl. Added calculateRetrievability helper method with formula R(t,S) = (1 + t/(9S))^(-1). Maturity: new (lastReview=0 or stability=0), learning (0<stability<21), young (21<=stability<90), mature (stability>=21).
